elements.name: Acceptance Constraint 1
elements.text: The system must protect member and reward transactions with appropriate security controls.

elements.name: Acceptance Constraint 2
elements.text: The member-facing experience must remain usable on common digital channels.

elements.name: Acceptance Constraint 3
elements.text: The platform must support integrations with external systems such as payment confirmation and reporting sources.

elements.name: Acceptance Constraint 4
elements.text: The system must allow customers to enroll in the loyalty program digitally.

elements.name: Acceptance Constraint 5
elements.text: The system must show point balance and available rewards to eligible members.

elements.name: Acceptance Constraint 6
elements.text: The system must allow members to redeem rewards when eligibility conditions are satisfied.

elements.name: Acceptance Constraint 7
elements.text: The system must provide reporting on redemptions and campaign performance.

elements.name: Success Criterion 1
elements.text: Members can enroll and redeem rewards through one coherent digital journey.

elements.name: Success Criterion 2
elements.text: Operations managers can update the reward catalog without engineering support for routine changes.

elements.name: Success Criterion 3
elements.text: The business can review redemption and campaign performance in one reporting workflow.

elements.name: Customer
elements.text: Customer

elements.name: Operations Manager
elements.text: Operations Manager

elements.name: Payment Gateway
elements.text: Payment Gateway

elements.name: Rule 1
elements.text: A Redemption must not be fulfilled unless reward eligibility and available points are confirmed.

elements.name: Rule 2
elements.text: A Reward Catalog Entry must be validated before it becomes Published.

elements.name: Rule 3
elements.text: A Member must provide the required details and consents before enrollment completes.

elements.name: Invalid Catalog Change
elements.text: Publication is rejected because the new reward configuration would break an active offer.

flow_of_events: System blocks fulfillment until confirmation arrives.

elements.name: Missing Payment Confirmation
elements.text: Redemption pauses until dependent payment confirmation arrives.

elements.name: Reporting Delay
elements.text: Analytics view is partial because a reporting source is delayed.

elements.text: Redemption fails because no reward inventory remains.
